events.text: Assessed: the condenser/heat pump clearance falls short of the manufacturer's minimum, which is a code violation via IMC/IRC M1401.3 (equipment must be installed per manufacturer instructions). Written to `/app/answer.json` as `decision: fail`, `risk: medium`, with corrective actions (verify exact clearance spec, relocate/adjust, re-inspect before close-out).
